name: Dara
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Dara (Dakon/Doki), a West African game of the 'running-three' family. Drop 12 pieces each (three-in-a-rows during the drop do not capture), then slide pieces one step orthogonally; form a row of exactly three of your own pieces to remove one enemy piece. Reduce your opponent so they can no longer make a three (or leave them with no move) to win.
